title: Combine Property
subtitle: Select properties to merge and review before combining
emptyStateSubtitle: Select a base property and choose properties to combine using Range or Individual selection method, then click “Proceed” to review.
selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one property to combine
rangeInvalidError: 'To' property must not be before 'From' property. Please select a valid range.
selectAtLeastOneToMerge: Please select at least one property to combine using the checkboxes.
differentOwnersError: Cannot combine properties with different owner names
missingOwnerError: Owner name is not present, only occupier name is available. Cannot combine property.
confirmCombineDesc: Are you sure you want to combine the selected properties?
confirmCombineDiffOwnerDesc: Owner names are different for the selected properties. Do you want to combine? Click Combine to proceed or Cancel to abort.
propertyTypeMismatchAlert: Selected properties have different property types. Please select a property type from the dropdown to proceed.

error.title: Failed to connect server. Please try again later.
error.description: An error occurred while loading the combine property page. Please try again.

loading.description: Please wait while we fetch the property data

combinePropertyTooltip: This property we are combining in base property
